azure.note: Final Greek numeral/quire mark at line end is ν, not κ.

gemini.note: A stray letter 'ν' appears at the end of the line in the transcription.

azure.note: Left-margin line number (14-16) intruded; body also lacks initial epsilon in ἐξήρανεν.

gemini.note: This is the second part of the hyphenated word κατε-ξήρανεν from the previous line. The transcription incorrectly adds a prefix and a misplaced verse number.

applied.note: The transcription omits 'τοῦ' and has 'Σινὰ' instead of 'Σεινὰ'.

azure.note: Question mark is present after Aᵃ in the apparatus.

gemini.current: ὁ θεὸς sup ℵA rns Aᵃ [seq ras 2 vel 3 litt : bis scr εἶπεν A* vid] | κατοικησαν ℵ
gemini.correct: ὁ θς sup ℵA | παροικιας] παροικιαν A | εἶπεν] pr ὁ θεος αυτων εξελθειν εκ της παροικιας Aᵃ [seq ras 2 vel 3 litt: bis scr εἶπεν A*vid] | κατῴκησαν ℵ
gemini.note: The apparatus entry for verse 9 is severely garbled. It contains a nomen sacrum misread, missing entries, misread text, and a misspelling.
